title: Basic JavaScript Array Methods Part 1
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Array Methods Part 1. Focus on implementing push and pop (stack operations) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Array Methods Part 1
description: Create a function that uses push and pop (stack operations) and shift and unshift (queue operations) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Array Methods Part 1 Project
description: Build a small application that applies push and pop (stack operations), shift and unshift (queue operations), splice (add/remove/replace) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Array Methods Part 1
description: The following code has bugs related to push and pop (stack operations). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Array Methods Part 1
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with push and pop (stack operations) and shift and unshift (queue operations).
